holdings.infoBox: ODDZ is an equity ETF with a total of 26 individual holdings. The top holdings are Las Vegas Sands stock at 9.08%, Flutter Entertainment at 9.05%, DraftKings at 5.95%, MGM Resorts International at 5.51%, and Red Rock Resorts at 5.09%.

overview.description: The Corgi Sports Betting & Gambling ETF (ODDZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund is actively managed and invests in companies involved in sports betting, casino gaming, and gambling infrastructure, including sportsbook operators, gaming platforms, wagering technology, payments, and compliance services. The fund aims for capital growth. ODDZ was launched on May 6, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.
